description: User clicks on the 'Top 15 Home Loan Rates' search result for aussie.com.au
frame_description: The user selects the Aussie home loan comparison link from the search results.
The browser transitions from Google search results to the Aussie website.

description: User examines the Aussie home page
page_title: Compare low home loan rates | Aussie
frame_description: The user pauses to read the options on the landing page.

description: User clicks the 'I want to refinance' button
frame_description: The user selects the refinance option to proceed with the loan comparison.
A transition screen with the Aussie logo and a loading message is displayed.

description: Navigation to the loan balance question page
frame_description: The application moves to the next step in the flow.

description: User clicks on the loan balance input field to bring up the keyboard
frame_description: The user focuses the text input field to enter their current loan balance.

description: User types '1,000,000' into the loan balance input field
interaction_target: What is your current loan balance?
frame_description: The user enters a numerical value into the form field using the on-screen keyboard.
